name: Alex Rivera
escalation_triggers: Any change to dispatch_events schema — notify Priya Nair (Data Platform) 1 sprint ahead
Any change to API contracts — notify Chris Wang (BA) and Mobile squad
Any change to error codes or log formats — notify Morgan Blake (Ops) before shipping
Any architectural decision — requires Ravi Sharma (Staff Engineer) sign-off
Any change to job_assignment module — requires Jordan Lee (QA) sign-off
safety_guardrails: Never write DELETE/DROP/TRUNCATE without WHERE clause
Never push directly to main or release/* branches
Always run EXPLAIN ANALYZE before merging queries on large tables

hooks.description: Shell commands Claude Code executes automatically at lifecycle events

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(DROP|TRUNCATE|DELETE FROM|push.*main|push.*release|--no-verify|force-push)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive or unsafe git/SQL command detected. Review safety_checklist.md before proceeding.'; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(\.env|\.pem|\.key|password|secret|api_key)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Possible secret or credential in file write. Review before committing.'; exit 1; fi
echo 'File written. Reminder: run tests before raising PR. Check eval_checklist.md for generated code quality checks.'
echo 'Session complete. Before closing: (1) run Jest locally, (2) check SonarQube gate, (3) verify no .env changes staged.'
